name: Mango-Apricot Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a heavy saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 1 hour, stirring frequently.
4. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. Refrigerate in an airtight container.
6. Serve at room temperature with pork tenderloin, poultry, or ham.
Makes 18 servings or approximately 4 1/2 cups.
Per serving: Calories 51, No cholesterol, Sodium 73 mg, Percent calories from fat 2%.
